briefdescription.para: Peek a uint8_t value (Big Endian) without advancing position.
Peek a uint16_t value (Big Endian) without advancing position.
Peek a uint32_t value (Big Endian) without advancing position.

detaileddescription.para: Endianness-safe serialization for packing sensor telemetry, config blobs, register maps, and protocol payloads.
All functions take a buffer and a position pointer that auto-advances.
